SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-06-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KAITLIN BOYLE MCBRIDE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVENTS WEST, INC IS PRESENT BY ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE FOLLOWING REQURIED DOCUMENTS WERE NOT FILED BY DEFENDANT: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AND REQUEST FOR COURT APPEARANCE BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT EVENTS WEST INC., REPRESENTED BY BENJAMIN LICHTMAN IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE HIS REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AS WELL AS AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SC-109) NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE INSTRUCTED TO MAIL COPIES OF ALL DOCUMENTS/EXHIBITS THAT WILL BE PRESENTED THE TIME OF THE TRIAL TO EACH OTHER AS WELL AS TO THE COURT PRIOR TO APRIL 6, 2021. DEFENDANT CONFIRMS HIS CORRECT ADDRESS TO BE P.O. BOX 884923, SF, CA 94188-4923. PLAINTIFF CONFIRMS THAT HER ADDRESS LISTED IN THE COURT RECORDS IS CORRECT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
